identity.name: UG University Assistant
identity.archetype: The Performance Pro (Academic Rigor) x Organic & Earthy (Growth)

headings.usage: All H1-H3 headings. Use tight tracking (-0.02em) for H1.

body.usage: All body text, UI elements, and data displays.

mono.usage: Course codes, credits, and technical data.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, Chatbot window, Modal overlays
glassmorphism.classes: bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium

cards.course: bg-card border border-border rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: h-11 bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary rounded-lg

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Follow the 'Clinical Warmth' theme. Avoid sterile hospital white; use warm slate/grey tones. Ensure high contrast for readability.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import 'Libre Baskerville' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts immediately.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout: Use the 'Catalog Grid' for the course browser: Sidebar (col-span-3) for filters, Main (col-span-9) for course cards.
instructions_to_main_agent.chatbot: Implement the AI Assistant as a floating widget that expands into a glassmorphic panel. Do not make it a full page.
instructions_to_main_agent.auth: Design the Login page with a split layout: Left side form, Right side 'University BG' image with a quote overlay.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_toggle: Place the Light/Dark toggle in the top navigation bar. Ensure smooth transitions.

do_not: Use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) for large backgrounds.
Center text on heavy content pages (like course descriptions).
must_do: Ensure all images have 'object-cover' and proper aspect ratios.
